title: Bedevilled
tmdbOverview: A disillusioned Seoul woman visits a remote island to reconnect with a childhood friend, only to find her trapped in an oppressive cycle of physical, mental, and sexual abuse. As tensions escalate, the situation spirals into a harrowing tale of survival and retribution.
synopsis: Bedevilled (2010) is a thriller, crime and drama film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 18 certification (GB rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
